body:
- [ ] Add `"live"` tab ID to `AppContext.tsx` TabId type
- [ ] Add recording RPC methods to `types.ts` (startRecording, stopRecording, getRecordingStatus)
- [ ] Add recording RPC handlers to `index.ts` (backend stubs)
- [ ] Create `LiveDashboard.tsx` component with recording controls:
  - [ ] Record button (toggle start/stop) with red dot indicator
  - [ ] Recording duration timer display
  - [ ] File size counter (real-time)
  - [ ] Data rate indicator (KB/s or MB/s)
  - [ ] Auto-generated filename with track_car_date pattern
  - [ ] Custom output directory option
  - [ ] Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+R) for record toggle
  - [ ] Confirmation dialog on stop to prevent accidental data loss
- [ ] Update `App.tsx` to include Live Dashboard tab
- [ ] Verify build compiles
- [ ] Run code review and security scan

<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> 
> ----
> 
> *This section details on the original issue you should resolve*
> 
> <issue_title>Add recording start/stop controls to dashboard UI</issue_title>
> <issue_description>## Description
> Add recording controls to the live dashboard tab.
> 
> ## Requirements
> - Record button (toggles start/stop) with red dot indicator when active
> - Recording duration timer display
> - File size counter (updating in real-time)
> - Data rate indicator (KB/s or MB/s)
> - Auto-generated filename with track_car_date pattern
> - Option to set custom output directory
> - Keyboard shortcut for record toggle (e.g. `Ctrl+R`)
> - Confirmation dialog on stop to prevent accidental data loss</issue_description>
> 
> ## Comments on the Issue (you are @copilot in this section)
> 
> <comments>
> </comments>
> 


</details>



<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->

- Fixes SeamusMullan/TeleMU#5

title: [WIP] Add recording start/stop controls to dashboard UI
